auth.notLinked:
To get started, link your account:

1. Go to aineron.net
2. Account → Telegram → Connect

All features will be available once linked.
auth.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a minute and try again.

payment.subscribeUnavailable: Subscriptions aren't available yet — top up your balance instead: /buy
payment.enterUsdAmount: Enter the top-up amount in USD (from $1 to $1000):
payment.cryptoUnavailable: Crypto payment is currently unavailable. Please try Telegram Stars instead.
payment.cryptoError: Couldn't create the invoice. Please try again later.
payment.cryptoInvoiceCreated: Invoice created: {amount} {credits} credits will be added once payment is confirmed.

referral.title: Referral Program
referral.footer: You get a bonus on your balance for every referral who pays!
referral.affiliateBody: The bot participates in Telegram's affiliate program: connect it in your channel's "Monetization" section and earn a commission on all Stars payments from users you refer. Payouts are made by Telegram itself.

menu.chatBody:
Ask a question or a task — the AI will reply.

For a new conversation: /newchat
menu.imageBody: Describe the image with a command: /image sunset over the sea, anime style
menu.helpBody: Chat & generation Ask any question — the AI will reply. /image <description> — generate an image Controls /models — choose an AI model /balance — balance and top-up /settings — settings /language — change bot language /newchat — start a new conversation Top up your balance: aineron.net/account/billing/
menu.videoBody: Describe the video with a command: /video sunset over the sea, slow camera flyover Ready in 5-15 minutes — I'll send you the result.
menu.featureUnavailable: This feature isn't available yet on aineron.net.

start.dashboardHint: Type a question or pick a section from the menu.
start.promptLoading: Loading the prompt, type your request!
start.refApplied: Referral code applied. To get started, link your account: 1. Go to aineron.net 2. Account → Telegram → Connect 3. Come back here via the link
start.linkInvalidBody: This link has expired or was already used. Go to aineron.net → Account → Telegram to get a new link.
start.introBody: An AI platform: GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini and other models. To get started: 1. Go to aineron.net 2. Account → Telegram → Connect 3. Come back here via the link Once linked, you'll have access to all models and your balance.

onboarding.title: Choose a model
onboarding.chooseModel: Pick a default model for chat. You can change it anytime in Settings.
onboarding.readyQuestion: Ask your first question — I'm ready.
onboarding.doneBody: You can pick a model anytime via Settings → Change model. Ask your first question!

settings.title: Aineron · Settings
settings.sendNewPrompt: Send a new prompt or /cancel to abort.

language.title: Language
language.subtitle: Choose the language for bot messages. Automatic follows your Telegram app language.

timezone.title: Timezone
timezone.subtitle: Used for /remind and /digest so times match your local clock.
timezone.enterCustom: Enter your UTC offset, e.g. +3, -5, or +3:30:
timezone.invalidCustom: Couldn't parse that. Enter an offset like +3, -5, or +3:30 (between UTC-12 and UTC+14):

models.tabOpenFailed: Couldn't open the tab. Try /models again.

remind.askText: What should I remind you about? Type the reminder text.
remind.notFound: Reminder not found or already sent.

digest.linkFirst: Link your account with /start before setting up the digest.
digest.offBody:
It sends a short daily AI news summary and a tip once a day.

Send /digest on, or set a time: /digest 09:00
digest.enabledAt: Daily digest enabled. Will arrive at {time} (your local time).
digest.invalidTime: Invalid time. Use HH:MM format, e.g. /digest 09:00
digest.onCommands:
Commands:
• /digest off — disable
• /digest HH:MM — change time

images.title: Aineron · Image
images.example: /image sunset over the sea, anime style
images.notFound: Image generated but not found. Check /account/files/
images.error: Generation failed. Please try later — your balance has been refunded.

chat.noModels: No models available. Please contact support.
chat.newChatStarted: New conversation started. Ask your first question.
chat.dislikeHint: [The previous reply wasn't good enough. Answer in more detail and more precisely.]

voice.label: [Voice]:
voice.recognitionFailed: Couldn't recognize the voice message. Please try again.
voice.synthesisError: Speech synthesis failed. Please try later.

video.title: Aineron · Video
video.example: /video sunset over the sea, slow camera flyover
video.noModels: No video generation models available. Choose a model: /models
video.readyHint: Ready in 5–15 minutes — I'll send the result.

videoSettings.title: Aineron · Video settings
videoSettings.hint: Tap a button to change its value. Settings are saved for this model and applied in /video and /img2video.

img2img.usageDescription: Edit an existing photo using AI.
img2img.usageSendPhoto: After the command, send the photo you want to edit.
img2img.noModels: No image-to-image models available. Try again later.
img2img.promptSaved: Prompt saved: {prompt} Now send the photo you want to edit. Model: {name}
img2img.notFound: Image generated but not found. Check /account/files/
img2img.notPhotoCancelled: Expected a photo — cancelling. Start over: /img2img <prompt>

img2video.usageDescription: Bring your photo to life — AI creates a video from an image.
img2video.usageSendPhoto: After the command, send a photo.
img2video.noModels: No video models available. Try again later or use /models.
img2video.promptSaved: Prompt: {prompt} Send a photo to animate. Model: {name}
img2video.downloading: Downloading photo and starting video generation...
img2video.generating: Generating video ({name})... This takes 3-8 minutes. Prompt: {prompt}
img2video.notFound: Video generated but not found. Check /account/files/
img2video.error: Video generation failed. Please try again.
img2video.generatingDots: Generating video... (~{min} min, usually 3-8 min) Prompt: {prompt}
img2video.timeout: Timed out (15 min). If the video was generated, it will appear at {url}/account/files/
img2video.notPhotoCancelled: Expected a photo — cancelling. Start over: /img2video <prompt>

sticker.usageDescription: Create a sticker from any description.
sticker.usageExample: /sticker cute cat in a detective hat
sticker.insufficientFunds:
Insufficient balance. Need: {need}, you have: {have}
/balance — top up
sticker.ready: Sticker ready. More stickers: /sticker your prompt
sticker.notFound: Sticker created but not found. Please try again.

prompts.emptyLibrary:
The prompt library is empty for now.
Add prompts at {url}
prompts.title: Prompt Library

memory.emptyBody: The AI automatically remembers facts about you during conversation. Add manually: /memory add I work as a Python developer

persona.resetDone: Persona reset. The default mode is now used.
persona.resetDoneShort: Persona reset. Using the default mode.
persona.unavailableBody: The administrator hasn't added any personas yet.
persona.title: AI Personas
persona.choose: Choose a persona — it will set the system prompt and change the bot's behavior:
persona.appliedBody: System prompt set. Start a new chat (/newchat) for a clean start.

poll.askOptions: Enter the answer options separated by commas (2-10 options):
poll.needMoreOptions: You need at least 2 answer options, separated by commas.
poll.tooManyOptions: Maximum 10 options. Please shorten the list.
poll.sent:
Poll sent! Once it's closed, I'll run an AI analysis of the results.
Close the poll via the Telegram menu when you're ready.

export.noActiveChat: You don't have an active chat to export.
export.noMessages: There are no messages in the current chat to export.
export.caption: Chat export {title} ({count} messages)

history.empty: Chat history is empty. Start a new conversation.
history.title: Chat history ({total} total):
history.newChatStarted: New chat started. Ask your first question.

files.photoError: Couldn't process the image. Please try again.
files.unsupportedFormat: Supported formats: PDF, TXT, DOC, DOCX. Received: {ext}
files.analyzeDocumentPrompt: Analyze the contents of the document "{name}"
files.documentError: Couldn't process the file. Please try again.
files.projectFull: This project already has {max} files (the maximum)
files.addedToKb: File {filename} added to the knowledge base of project "{project}". Processing will take a few seconds.
files.uploadError: File upload failed. Please try again.

topics.comingSoon: Project topics are coming soon. For now, use /projects to switch context.
topics.unsupported: This bot version doesn't support topics — use /projects.
topics.title: Project topics
topics.noProjects: You don't have any projects yet. Create your first one: /projects
topics.chooseProject: Choose a project — I'll create a separate topic for it in this chat. Each topic has its own context, persona, and project knowledge base.
topics.createFailed: Couldn't create the topic. Make sure topics are enabled in the chat with the bot.
topics.projectCardBody: Write here — this project's context, persona, and knowledge base are connected automatically.

inline.notLinkedMessage: To use this: send /start to @{bot} and link your account
inline.hintMessage: Type your query after @{bot} to get an AI answer

projects.noProjects:
You don't have any projects yet.
Create one at {url}
projects.linkAccountFull: Link your account with /start to work with projects.
projects.allMessagesContext: All messages now go through this project's context.
projects.addFileHint: To add a file to the knowledge base — just send a PDF, TXT, DOC, or DOCX.

channel.title: Channel Maker
channel.introBody:
AI will publish posts to your channel on a schedule: fresh facts from web search, ready-made text, no effort on your part.

1. Add the bot as a channel administrator (with the "Post messages" right)
2. Send the channel's @username here, or forward any post from it
channel.introFooter: Each post is billed at the model's per-message price.
channel.notUnderstood: I didn't get that. Send the channel's @username or forward a post from it. Cancel: /cancel
channel.notAChannel: This isn't a channel. Send the channel's @username.
channel.notAdmin: The bot isn't a channel administrator or lacks the "Post messages" right. Grant the right and send the channel again.
channel.checkFailed: Couldn't verify the channel. Make sure the bot was added as administrator, then send the @username again.
channel.connected:
Channel "{title}" connected.

What should the posts be about? Describe the topic and style, for example:
"AI news for entrepreneurs, business tone, 3-5 paragraphs, with a practical takeaway at the end"
channel.limitBody: Active tasks: {count} of {limit} allowed by your plan. Free up a slot (/tasks) or upgrade your plan: /balance
channel.postPromptTemplate: Write a ready-to-publish post for the Telegram channel "{title}". Topic and style: {topic}. Use fresh facts from web search. The post should be self-contained: an engaging opening, the substance, and a takeaway. No hashtags, and don't mention that you are an AI.
channel.launchedBody: {title} Topic: {topic} Schedule: {schedule} The first post will go out on schedule. Manage it via /tasks (the "Now" button publishes immediately)
